step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the previous conclusion. The use of corticosteroids (option D) would indeed stand out as an inappropriate intervention without specific indications such as significant inflammatory reaction or allergic response. While over-instrumentation can help prevent further issues from blockage, cold/hot compresses provide symptomatic relief post-procedurally, and antibiotics may occasionally be needed depending on signs of systemic involvement, they do have more direct applications compared to steroids.
